lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਕਰਿ ਰੰਙੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har raam naam kar rang |
lines.english: O my mind, enshrine love for the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਹਰਿ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਰਾਉ ਨਿਸੰਙੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai har upadesiaa har bhettiaa raau nisang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru, satisfied and pleased, taught me about the Lord, and my Sovereign Lord King met with me at once. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਇਆਣੀ ਮਨਮੁਖੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਅੰਙੁ ॥
lines.translit: mundh eaanee manamukhee fir aavan jaanaa ang |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is like the ignorant bride, who comes and goes again and again in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਮਨਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਸਹਲੰਙੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har prabh chit na aaeo man doojaa bhaau sehalang |2|
lines.english: The Lord God does not come into her consciousness, and her mind is stuck in the love of duality. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮੈਲੁ ਭਰੇ ਦੁਹਚਾਰੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਅੰਗੀ ਅੰਙੁ ॥
lines.translit: ham mail bhare duhachaareea har raakhahu angee ang |
lines.english: I am full of filth, and I practice evil deeds; O Lord, save me, be with me, merge me into Your Being!

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਵਲਾਇਆ ਸਭਿ ਲਾਥੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਪੰਙੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur amrit sar navalaaeaa sabh laathe kilavikh pang |3|
lines.english: The Guru has bathed me in the pool of Ambrosial Nectar, and all my dirty sins and mistakes have been washed away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦੀਨਾ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਸੰਙੁ ॥
lines.translit: har deenaa deen deaal prabh satasangat melahu sang |
lines.english: O Lord God, Merciful to the meek and the poor, please unite me with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਰੰਙੁ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: mil sangat har rang paaeaa jan naanak man tan rang |4|3|
lines.english: Joining the Sangat, servant Nanak has obtained the Lord's Love; my mind and body are drenched in it. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਕਪਟੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਹਿਰਦਾ ਸੁਧੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har kareh nit kapatt kamaaveh hiradaa sudh na hoee |
lines.english: One who chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, while constantly practicing deception, shall never become pure of heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin karam kareh bahutere supanai sukh na hoee |1|
lines.english: He may perform all sorts of rituals, night and day, but he shall not find peace, even in dreams. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਰੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੜੈ ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: korai rang kade na charrai je lochai sabh koee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The untreated cloth does not take up the dye, no matter how much everyone may wish it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: giaanee gur bin bhagat na hoee |
lines.english: O wise ones, without the Guru, there is no devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਵਰਤ ਕਰੇ ਪੂਜਾ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam varat kare poojaa manamukh rog na jaaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh may perform chants, meditations, austere self-discipline, fasts and devotional worship, but his sickness does not go away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰੋਗੁ ਮਹਾ ਅਭਿਮਾਨਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: antar rog mahaa abhimaanaa doojai bhaae khuaaee |2|
lines.english: Deep within him is the sickness of excessive egotism; in the love of duality he is ruined. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਭੇਖ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਮਨੂਆ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: baahar bhekh bahut chaturaaee manooaa deh dis dhaavai |
lines.english: Outwardly, he wears religious robes and he is very clever, but his mind wanders in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਆਪਿਆ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੑੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੂਨੀ ਆਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: haumai biaapiaa sabad na cheenai fir fir joonee aavai |3|
lines.english: Engrossed in ego, he does not remember the Word of the Shabad; over and over again, he is reincarnated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: naanak nadar kare so boojhai so jan naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, that mortal who is blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace, understands Him; that humble servant meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਏਕੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਏਕਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee eko boojhai ekas maeh samaae |4|4|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he understands the One Lord, and is absorbed into the One Lord. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har naam padaarath paaee |1|
lines.english: I found the wealth of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: merai man har har saant vasaaee |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, has enshrined peace within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਗਰੀ ਖੋਜਿ ਖੋਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramat nagaree khoj khojaaee |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, I searched and searched the body-village;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਜੀਵਾ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavaa jeevaa meree maaee |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, I live, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਖਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਭ ਭੁਖ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tisanaa agan bujhee khin antar gur miliai sabh bhukh gavaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The fire of desire was extinguished in an instant, when I met the Guru; all my hunger has been satisfied. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਢੂਢਿ ਢੂਢਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hau har prabh piaaraa dtoodt dtoodtaaee |
lines.english: I search for and seek out my Beloved Lord God, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦਇਆਲਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur deaal gun naam drirraaee |2|
lines.english: The Merciful True Guru implanted the Glorious Praises of the Naam within me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਮੇਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਈ ॥੪॥੧॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur naanak tutthaa melai har bhaaee |4|1|5|
lines.english: Guru Nanak, pleased and satisfied, has united me with the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny. ||4||1||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satasangat mil har ras paaee |3|
lines.english: Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, I have obtained the subtle essence of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖ ਲਿਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dhur masatak lekh likhe har paaee |
lines.english: By the pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon my forehead, I have found the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kripaa kare man har rang laae |
lines.english: Showering His Mercy, the Lord imbues the mind with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh har har naam samaae |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukh merges in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand rahai din raatee poore gur kai sabad samaane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He remains always blissful, day and night, and he merges into the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raataa man rang maane |
lines.english: Imbued with the Lord's Love, the mortal enjoys the pleasure of His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਚਲੂਲਾ ਹੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh rang chaloolaa hoee |2|
lines.english: the Gurmukh is imbued with the deep red color of His Love. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਕਉ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har rang kau lochai sabh koee |
lines.english: Everyone longs for the Lord's Love;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਨਰੁ ਕੋਰਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mugadh nar koraa hoe |
lines.english: The foolish, self-willed manmukh is left pale and uncolored.
